title: Incorrect simulation in presence of MULTIDRIVEN

features.name: multidriven signal with different clocks on dual-port memory
features.description: Code should include a dual-port memory where each port is clocked by a different always_ff block driving the same signal via MULTIDRIVEN

features.name: clock extraction via concat and bitsel from vector
features.description: Code should include clocks that are packed into a vector using concatenation and then extracted via bit selection for use in clocking logic

features.name: latency-1 read port on dual-port memory
features.description: Code should include a dual-port memory with latency-1 read behavior where read address is registered and data comes out after one clock cycle

extraction_summary.note: No code_blocks in issue_input.json; features extracted from textual description of bug scenario
